extraction.one_line_summary: ROLLAND Pierre attacked from breakaway on late uncategorized incline with 40km to go, gaining decisive 23-second gap that chasers never closed.
tactical_patterns: ROLLAND repeatedly attacked on inclines after struggling on descents earlier, timing final dig when break looked at each other.
CONTI Valerio forced multiple accelerations working for COSTA Rui, bleeding energy from break before ROLLAND's winning move.
MOHORIČ Matej isolated doing all front work in break, demonstrating how single worker collapses group cohesion before finale.

rider_signals.ROLLAND Pierre: positive: serial attacker transformed weakness (poor descending) into strength by choosing uphill terrain for decisive move
rider_signals.MOHORIČ Matej: negative: exhausted himself with excessive front work while others marked, had nothing left for final selection
rider_signals.BRUTT Pavel: negative: dropped on second category descent looking white as sheet, confirming descending weakness when in breaks
rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: negative: laboring and getting out of shape even on transitional stage day after losing time
rider_signals.COSTA Rui: neutral: had CONTI working hard to set up sprint but couldn't close 23-second gap to ROLLAND
rider_signals.CONTI Valerio: neutral: aggressive domestique work for COSTA depleted him before critical selection moment
